title: Satisfaction Guaranteed - Unofficial
description: A modrinth Recreation of the Modpack Satisfaction Guaranteed by AsianHalfSquat
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/F8KhlI-W7WM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># Overhauled Graphics
I've selected a wide variety of mods and resource packs, along with Complementary shaders enhanced with Euphoria patches to completely transform the way your game looks. All while remaining completely client side. This means you can play with this pack on any vanilla-compatible server. Make sure all the mods are allowed if you play a public server!

# Immersive Audio
A selection of audio enhancing mods provide an enhanced soundscape and biome specific music. I've made sure these additions don't detract from the Minecraft experience, so they should feel well integrated.

# Performance
Satisfaction Guaranteed contains a multitude of performance enhancing mods such as Sodium, providing a significant FPS boost when compared to a vanilla client. While visuals are the main focus of this modpack, it should still run quite well on many gaming computers.

# Controller Support
Controlify is included within the modpack, providing outstanding controller support for Minecraft. It's highly customizable and works flawlessly with the included mods!

# Simplified Multiplayer Support
This modpack includes e4mc, allowing you to easily play with friends on a LAN server. Simply Open LAN as usual and share the provided link!
